abilities.description:
Converts the target unit to ethereal form, rendering them immune to physical damage, but unable to attack and -30% more vulnerable to magic damage.

 Enemy targets are also slowed by -80%, and take 1x the sum of all your attributes + 50 as magical damage.
Duration: 4 seconds
abilities.title: Ether Blast

name: Ethereal Blade
notes:
Shares cooldown with Ghost Scepter and its upgrades.
Ethereal units take -30% bonus magic damage.
